coverage.criterion: Detection engine identifies recurring patterns with confidence score (95/80/60% tiers)
coverage.notes: Shared recurrence core with 95/80/60 tiers (T-0025); detection pipeline orchestrates classify + fingerprint dedup (T-0028); run_detection upserts pending with confidence metadata (T-0029); unit tests for confidence scoring (T-0036)

coverage.criterion: User receives notification for new detected subscription with confirm/reject actions
coverage.notes: Alerts inserted on new detection (T-0029); post-sync detection hook (T-0030); confirm/reject REST endpoints (T-0032); pending cards with confirm/reject + kind override dialog (T-0033); alerts banner, toast after sync poll (T-0034)

coverage.criterion: Confirmed subscriptions appear in subscription list with interval and amount
coverage.notes: subscription_patterns schema with interval_days and current_amount (T-0026); repository fetch by status (T-0027); GET /api/v1/subscriptions list with filters (T-0032); confirmed/all table with interval and amount (T-0033)

coverage.criterion: Standing-order (Dauerauftrag) patterns detected separately from discretionary subscriptions
coverage.notes: subscription_kind enum subscription|standing_order (T-0026); classify module Dauerauftrag rules (T-0028); list filter by kind (T-0032); Standing orders tab + confirm kind override (T-0033)

coverage.criterion: Price increase/decrease detected when amount changes for confirmed subscription
coverage.notes: price_change_min_eur/pct config (T-0027); price_change dual-threshold on confirmed only (T-0028); GET /price-history endpoint (T-0032); ECharts price history line in detail drawer (T-0034)

coverage.criterion: Alert fired on new subscription detection and on price change
coverage.notes: subscription_alerts table + alert_type enum (T-0026); alert CRUD + unread filter (T-0027); emit new_detection/price_change/interval_change (T-0028); run_detection inserts alerts (T-0029); sync triggers detection (T-0030); alerts list + mark-read API (T-0032); banner + toast UX (T-0034)

coverage.criterion: Grafana Dashboard 2 (Subscriptions, price changes, new) provisioned
coverage.notes: subscriptions.json uid subscriptions: confirmed/pending stat panels, monthly spend, price changes 90d table, new detections time series (T-0035)

coverage.criterion: Rejected patterns do not appear in subscription forecasts or alerts
coverage.notes: rejection fingerprint lookup prevents re-detection (T-0027); sync passes DetectionResult to forecast (T-0030); forecast override excludes rejected_fingerprints + confirmed override (T-0031); reject endpoint persists fingerprint (T-0032); unit/integration tests for override and exclusion (T-0036)

summary.tasks_without_acceptance_ref_note: All tasks T-0025–T-0036 map to at least one AC in tasks.md acceptance refs and coverage map
